mapper.select: select u.*, r.name as role_name, d.name as department from users u left join roles r on r.code = u.role left join departments d on d.id = u.department_id where u.name = #{name}
select u.*, r.name as role_name, d.name as department from users u left join roles r on r.code = u.role left join departments d on d.id = u.department_id where u.id = #{id}
select count(1) from roles where code = #{code} and is_active = 1
mapper.update: update users set name = #{name}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update users set password = #{password}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update users set role = #{role}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update users set is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
